question: What is the relation between the detected football player and the crowd in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The crowd is surrounding the football player. (B) The football player is standing behind the crowd. (C) There is no relation between them in the image. (D) The football player is standing in front of the crowd.
gold_answer: The football player is standing in front of the crowd
answer_choices: The crowd is surrounding the football player
The football player is standing behind the crowd
There is no relation between them in the image
The football player is standing in front of the crowd
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
